Quick Summary

Terms At A Glance

The key points in plain English. Full details in the sections below.

Services Provided

We build websites, manage paid ads, and deliver AI automation systems. Each project scope is agreed upfront.

Payments

Clear invoicing schedules. Late payments may pause services. Ad spend is separate unless explicitly included.

Client Responsibilities

Provide accurate info, required access, and timely feedback. Delayed approvals may affect project timelines.

Ownership

You own your assets after full payment. We retain the right to display work in our portfolio unless agreed otherwise.

Liability

We do not guarantee specific revenue outcomes or platform performance. Our liability is capped at fees paid.

Termination

Either party may terminate with notice. Outstanding balances remain due. Assets are transferred upon final payment.

Full Terms

The Full Agreement

Each section is expandable. Click to read the details.

Contents

Introduction Services Client Responsibilities Payments Website Development Paid Advertising AI Automation Intellectual Property Limitation of Liability Termination Changes To Terms Contact

Welcome to ScaleStack Solutions. By engaging our services, accessing our website, or signing a service agreement, you agree to these Terms of Service.

These terms govern the relationship between ScaleStack Solutions ("we," "our," "us") and clients ("you," "your"). Please read them carefully. If you have any questions, contact us before proceeding.

ScaleStack Solutions provides the following core services:

Website Development

Custom websites, landing pages, and web applications built to your brief.

Paid Advertising

Campaign strategy, setup, and management across Google, Meta, and other platforms.

AI Automation Solutions

Chatbots, lead management systems, appointment booking, and workflow automation.

Growth Consulting

Strategy, analytics, and guidance to accelerate your business growth.

Specific deliverables, timelines, and inclusions are defined in individual project agreements or proposals.

To ensure successful delivery, clients agree to:

  • Provide accurate information — Business details, brand assets, goals, and any relevant background needed for your project.
  • Provide required access — Platform logins, hosting credentials, ad account access, or any tools necessary for service delivery.
  • Review deliverables promptly — Timely feedback ensures projects stay on schedule. Delays from the client side may push deadlines.
  • Pay invoices on time — As outlined in your agreement. Late payments may result in paused services.
  • Provide legal content — Clients are responsible for ensuring all content they supply is lawful and does not infringe third-party rights.

Payment schedules are outlined in individual project agreements. Common structures include deposits, milestone payments, and monthly retainers.

Subscription services are billed monthly or as otherwise agreed. Cancellation must be provided with the agreed notice period to avoid further billing.

Late payments may result in suspended work until the outstanding balance is cleared. We reserve the right to apply a late fee of up to 5% per month on overdue amounts.

Advertising spend (e.g. Google Ads budget, Meta Ads budget) is not included in our management fees unless explicitly stated in your agreement. Ad spend is billed directly by the platform or invoiced separately.

Refund policy: Completed work and delivered milestones are non-refundable. Disputes must be raised within 14 days of invoice.

Project scope is defined in the project proposal or brief. Work outside agreed scope may incur additional charges.

Revision rounds are limited to those agreed in your package. Additional revisions are billed at our hourly rate.

Launch requires client sign-off. Final approval from the client constitutes acceptance of the delivered product.

Ownership of the completed website transfers to the client upon receipt of full payment. Until then, all work remains the property of ScaleStack Solutions.

Hosting and domain are the client's responsibility unless included in a specific agreement. We may assist with setup but are not liable for third-party hosting issues.

Campaign management includes strategy, setup, optimisation, and reporting. We act as your advertising partner, not the platform.

Platform dependency: Our services rely on third-party platforms (Google, Meta, etc.). We are not responsible for platform policy changes, account suspensions, or algorithm updates outside our control.

No guaranteed results: Advertising performance is influenced by budget, market conditions, offer quality, and many other factors. We do not guarantee specific click volumes, leads, or revenue outcomes.

Performance variables such as seasonality, competition, and market conditions can impact results. We will always communicate performance honestly and work proactively to improve.

Chatbot and automation systems are built to your specifications. Configurations and flows are tested before deployment.

AI limitations: AI systems can make errors, misunderstand inputs, or behave unexpectedly in edge cases. We recommend client oversight of AI interactions, particularly in sensitive contexts.

Monitoring: We strongly recommend ongoing monitoring of AI systems. Clients are responsible for reviewing AI-generated outputs in customer-facing environments.

Third-party AI platforms (such as OpenAI, GoHighLevel, etc.) operate under their own terms. We are not liable for outages or changes to these platforms.

Ownership of custom-built automation workflows transfers to the client after full payment.

Ownership rights: All custom work (websites, copy, automation flows, ad creatives) becomes the property of the client upon receipt of full payment.

Pre-payment: Until full payment is received, all deliverables remain the intellectual property of ScaleStack Solutions.

Agency portfolio rights: We reserve the right to display completed work in our portfolio and marketing materials unless the client requests confidentiality in writing.

Client-supplied assets: Clients warrant that all content, images, logos, and materials they supply to us are legally owned or licensed for the intended use.

Third-party tools: Some deliverables may include licensed components (themes, plugins, fonts). These remain subject to their original licences.

No revenue guarantees: We do not guarantee specific sales, leads, conversions, or revenue outcomes from any of our services.

No platform guarantees: We are not liable for account suspensions, algorithm changes, policy updates, or platform outages by Google, Meta, or any third-party platform.

Third-party services: We are not responsible for failures, outages, or changes in third-party tools, software, or APIs that we integrate or use on your behalf.

Maximum liability: In all circumstances, ScaleStack Solutions' total liability to any client is limited to the total fees paid by that client in the 3 months preceding the claim.

Indirect damages: We are not liable for loss of profits, loss of data, or any indirect, consequential, or incidental damages arising from our services.

Termination procedures: Either party may terminate ongoing services with the agreed notice period (typically 30 days for retainer services) provided in writing.

Outstanding balances: Any fees owed for work completed up to the termination date remain payable in full, regardless of who initiates termination.

Data and access: Upon termination, we will return client-supplied assets and revoke our access to client accounts within a reasonable timeframe.

Asset transfers: Completed and fully paid deliverables will be transferred to the client. Work-in-progress may be transferred upon payment for work completed to date.

Immediate termination may be enacted by either party in cases of serious breach, fraudulent activity, or abusive conduct.

We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. When we do, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page.

For active clients, material changes will be communicated by email with reasonable notice. Continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

If you disagree with any changes, you may terminate your service agreement in accordance with the Termination clause.

For questions about these terms, please contact us:

Company: ScaleStack Solutions

Email: support@scalestacksolutions.com

Website: scalestacksolutions.com/contact

We aim to respond to all enquiries within 2 business days.

Our Promise

Our Commitment To Clients

These terms define legal obligations — but this is what we truly stand for.

Transparency

We tell you exactly what we're doing and why. No smoke and mirrors — just clear, honest reporting.

Communication

Proactive updates, fast response times, and honest conversations — always. You're never left wondering.

Professional Standards

Every deliverable is held to the highest standard. We take pride in the quality of our work.

Continuous Improvement

We continuously optimise campaigns, refine systems, and improve results — never set-and-forget.

Customer Success

Your growth is our growth. We measure our success by the results we deliver for you.

Ethical Practices

We follow platform guidelines, respect data privacy, and operate with integrity in everything we do.

FAQ

Common Questions

We do not guarantee specific revenue, lead numbers, or ROAS figures. Advertising and digital marketing results depend on many factors including market conditions, offer quality, and budget. What we do guarantee is professional effort, honest reporting, and continuous optimisation.

You do — once the project is paid in full. All custom code, design, and content created for your website becomes your property. We may retain the right to display the work in our portfolio unless you request otherwise in writing.

Yes. Ongoing retainer services can be cancelled with the agreed notice period (typically 30 days) provided in writing. One-time project fees for work already completed are non-refundable. We'll always handle cancellations professionally and ensure a smooth transition.

Platform policy changes are outside our control. If a campaign is suspended or restricted due to platform policy changes, we will notify you immediately and work to resolve the issue. We are not liable for losses caused by platform changes, but we will always act swiftly to protect your campaigns.

Yes, upon full payment you own the custom automation workflows we build for you. Note that some systems run on third-party platforms (like GoHighLevel) which have their own licencing. We'll clearly explain what you own outright versus what requires an ongoing platform subscription.

We invoice via email with clear due dates. Projects typically require a deposit upfront with the balance due on completion or at defined milestones. Retainers are billed monthly. We accept bank transfer and card payments. Late fees may apply on overdue invoices.

Questions About Our Terms?

We believe in transparency and are happy to answer any questions about our services and policies. No question is too small.
